name: Custom Theme
description: Netflix-style custom skin with settings panel, multiple fonts, i18n, and full customization. Install and everything works automatically — no manual CSS needed.
overview: Netflix-inspired skin for Jellyfin with built-in settings panel

versions.changelog: Fix: Assembly version now matches plugin version. Plugin correctly shows v1.3.3 in Jellyfin dashboard.
Fix: CSS auto-injection now works via IPluginServiceRegistrator + IHostedService. Previous approaches (constructor injection, plain IHostedService) silently failed.
Fix: CSS injection now happens in plugin constructor instead of IHostedService. CSS is guaranteed to load on every startup.
Renamed to Custom Theme. Fixed CSS injection — always replaces branding CSS. All 33 settings included.
12 new features: Hero Billboard, Auto-Hide Header, Card Info Overlay, Progress Bar Color, Card Size, Ambient Glow, Animation Speed, Compact Sidebar, Clock, Seasonal Themes, Card Style, Spoiler Mode
Auto-load JS via CSS loader — no index.html modification needed. Works on read-only Docker containers.
Initial release: Netflix-style UI, settings panel, i18n (EN/DE), 8 fonts, custom logo A-Z
